'''chazava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xvideo|xvideo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xvideo|xvideo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chazava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzævæth|chæzævæth]] || [[word:chæzævæj|chæzævæj]] || [[word:chæzævæsh|chæzævæsh]] || [[word:chæzævæ|chæzævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazazavath|chazazavath]] || [[word:chazazavaj|chazazavaj]] || [[word:chazazavash|chazazavash]] || [[word:chazazava|chazazava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazavath|chazavath]] || [[word:chazavaj|chazavaj]] || [[word:chazavash|chazavash]] || [[word:chazava|chazava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazafvath|chazafvath]] || [[word:chazafvaj|chazafvaj]] || [[word:chazafvash|chazafvash]] || [[word:chazafvaf|chazafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazavatha|chazavatha]] || [[word:chazavaja|chazavaja]] || [[word:chazavasha|chazavasha]] || [[word:chazavaka|chazavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazavath|chazavath]] || [[word:chazavaj|chazavaj]] || [[word:chazavash|chazavash]] || [[word:chazava|chazava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazavathal|chazavathal]] || [[word:chazavajal|chazavajal]] || [[word:chazavashal|chazavashal]] || [[word:chazavakal|chazavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazavathatha|chazavathatha]] || [[word:chazavajaja|chazavajaja]] || [[word:chazavashasha|chazavashasha]] || [[word:chazavaka|chazavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazavathan|chazavathan]] || [[word:chazavajan|chazavajan]] || [[word:chazavashan|chazavashan]] || [[word:chazavakan|chazavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazavathaoro|chazavathaoro]] || [[word:chazavajaoro|chazavajaoro]] || [[word:chazavashaoro|chazavashaoro]] || [[word:chazavakaoro|chazavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
